headline: ORLY Q1 Deep Dive: Market Share Gains and Consumer Demand Drive Upside
summary: Auto parts and accessories retailer O’Reilly Automotive (NASDAQ:ORLY) beat Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 10.2% year on year to $4.56 billion. On the other hand, the company’s full-year revenue guidance of $18.85 billion at the midpoint came in 0.6% below analysts’ estimates. Its GAAP profit of $0.72 per share was 3.3% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
